meaning: n.日本之神道教,1945年前为日本国教
examples: This is the most ancient, and holiest of the Shinto rituals.
Toil and sweat done, an apprentice meditates before a Shinto shrine.
Matches were held at Shinto shrines, whence sumo's elaborate pre-bout rituals descend.
The shrine itself is an innocuous and quite elegant place, as shinto shrines generally are.
Chichibu's sacred mountain, Mount Bukozan, has been the location for the Shinto Shrine for more than 2, 000 years.
